results.title: Misogynistic graffiti calling for freedom of convicted French rapist appears in Belfast
results.description: The hateful messaging was sprayed on the side of a shopfront in the Sandy Row area but has since been painted over

results.title: Cadiz farmers market returns Mondays in July and August at village square
results.description: Cadiz farmers market will be held from 4-6 p.m. every Monday in July and August at the village square, featuring local produce, baked goods, handmade items and other products from area vendors.

results.title: Mirziyoyev Orders Preparation of Comprehensive Pension System Reform
results.description: President Shavkat Mirziyoyev reviewed proposals to reform Uzbekistan's pension system, directing the development of cumulative, private, and corporate pension models alongside improved benefit calculations.

results.title: New GPS tracker for pets allows for two-way voice communication
results.description: Mova’s new SureTrack Pro helps dog and cat owners monitor the whereabouts of their furry companions. Beyond that, the GPS tracker offers additional features, including two-way voice communication.

results.title: Indian football amid FIFA WC: Young gen proves future isn’t all gloomy
results.description: While India watches the FIFA World Cup from the sidelines, two young young are showing the country has the talent to dream bigger.

results.title: Supreme Court Fines Samay Raina, Others ₹3 lakh For Violating Orders To Publicize Cause Of Specially Abled Persons
results.description: Supreme Court has imposed fine on Raina and others for not publicizing the cause of specially abled persons on their platforms and generating funds to provide timely treatment to specially abled.

Tripura Woman Says Owning A Paris Home Comes With More Than Just A Rs 1.4 Lakh EMI: ‘No Family Money, No Shortcut’
results.description: At 28, a woman from Tripura bought a home near Paris, but says the Rs 1.4 lakh EMI is only one part of the cost. She reveals the expenses no one warned her about before buying

results.title: WATCH: Frustration mounts as SAPS faces criticism over Anovuyo Oncke investigation
results.description: Community outrage grows as residents of Phumlani Village in Cape Town demand accountability from SAPS in the ongoing investigation of missing eight-year-old Anovuyo Oncke, last seen on September 6, 2025.

results.title: India bans the import of goods made using forced labour, even as U.S. investigation is pending
results.description: India bans imports of goods made with forced labor, aligning trade policies with international standards amid pending U.S. tariffs.

results.title: The UK wasted almost £10bn during their scramble to secure PPE during the Covid pandemic
results.description: The UK’s Covid Inquiry has criticised ‘vast’ waste in PPE procurement during the pandemic.

results.title: Residents wake to the smell of smoke in Oswestry and surrounding area
results.description: Residents from across the region have reported the smell of smoke which has been caused by a fire on Conwy Mountain

results.title: Minister of Tourism says Columbus Alcazar restoration is complete, and colonial city lighting is underway
results.description: The Ministry of Tourism announced Tourism Minister David Collado officially presented the completed structural restoration of the iconic Alcázar de Colón (Columbus Alcazar) Museum on 9 July 2026. The milestone project coincided with the launch of an RD$86 million public lighting initiative designed to install and upgrade lighting throughout key areas of Santo Domingo’s historic Colonial City. results.title: Elevation Capital has closed USD 500 Million India fund to back AI startups
results.description: Elevation Capital has closed its ninth India-focused fund at USD 500 Million, with a focus on backing early-stage startups building AI-led products and applications. The new fund will invest primarily in seed and Series A startups, particularly those building on the application layer of AI. The firm believes the next [...]

results.title: Wolves Leave Arokodare Out Of Pre-Season Squad Amid Fiorentina Interest
results.description: Super Eagles striker, Tolu Arokodare, has been left out of Wolverhampton Wanderers’ pre-season training squad, adding further weight to reports that he could be on his way out of Molineux this summer.
